name: fireclaude
description: Self-hosted Firecrawl for Claude Code — scrape, crawl, search, batch-dataset, JSON schema extract via local Ollama. No API keys, no paid tiers.

skills.name: fireclaude
skills.description: Scrape, crawl, search, extract, and track changes via self-hosted Firecrawl

install.description: Run ./install.sh to bootstrap the Docker stack (Firecrawl API + Playwright + SearxNG + Ollama)
